subject: fix(ui): restore per-cell subdivision borders in Structure tab grid
body:
The previous commit (33825aa) unnecessarily removed subdivision borders
from the Structure tab's interactive grid widget. These borders help
users visually distinguish cells within subdivided sections and are
part of the sidebar UI control — not the canvas preview.

Tags: ui, structure, layout
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cell-highlighting
Semver: patch

title: restore per-cell subdivision borders in Structure tab grid
